title: Dr. Isaac Gertz – Chief Nuclear Architect of the Zion Regime ransomware incident

victim.name: Dr. Isaac Gertz – Chief Nuclear Architect of the Zion Regime

extortion.description: Dr. Isaac Gertz, By now, you have surely felt it, the subtle shift in the air around you. The moment when an ordinary day becomes… wrong. The first $10,000 required for deep-field infiltration and extraction of classified intelligence has been deployed. Funds are moving. People are moving. Shadows are moving. All in directions you never…
